description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The house is enclosed by a low, light-colored perimeter wall, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The front features a paved driveway leading to the main entrance, which is slightly recessed and framed by greenery. The roof is flat, consistent with contemporary architectural trends, and the landscaping is minimal yet elegant. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and prominent trees flanking the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roofline, perimeter wall, and evenly spaced trees along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional windows, and the continuation of the perimeter wall and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the flat roof, side windows, and the green lawn within the enclosed yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a paved driveway, flanked by trees and minimal decorative elements
